recentArticles.title: Exclusive: ADA Canada and Warner Music Canada Ink Global Distribution Deal With Toronto R&B Label Escape Records - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: # Exclusive: ADA Canada and Warner Music Canada Ink Global Distribution Deal With Toronto R&B Label Escape Records. The new independent label, an extension of R&B-pop music discovery platform EscapeTracks, will release rising Minnesota-born artist 7AE’s new single “Mashallah," on July 3. ADA Canada, the distribution and artist services initiative of Warner Music Canada, has secured a global distribution deal with independent Toronto record label Escape Records, a label extension of the R&B-pop music discovery platform and events company, EscapeTracks. “After a decade of discovering and marketing artists with EscapeTracks, I’m excited to be working with ADA’s infrastructure and building on our shared vision to lay the foundation for our next chapter,” Sassi says. The global distribution deal with Escape Records adds to ADA Canada and WMC’s expansive global distribution portfolio, much of which has brought Canadian talent and initiatives onto its roster. * Country Label MDM Recordings Inks Global Distribution Deal With Warner Music Canada's ADA CANADA ›. ada warner music canada escape records 7ae.

recentArticles.title: BET Awards nominations 2026: See the full list, led by Cardi B, Kendrick Lamar and Mariah the Scientist - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: # BET Awards winners 2026: See the full list, from Teyana Taylor to Lauryn Hill and Cardi B. ## Taylor was moved to tears after Janet Jackson surprised her with the Icon of the Year award. Teyana Taylor fought back tears at the BET Awards on Sunday night as Janet Jackson made a surprise appearance to present her with the Icon of the Year Award. The singer, actor and director was overcome with emotion as Jackson praised her "unstoppable" work ethic and "God-given" talents before handing her the honor. The *One Battle After Another* star was one of the night's big winners, also taking home Best Actress, Video Director of the Year and the new Fashion Vanguard Award. Meanwhile, Lauryn Hill won the Living Legend Icon Award and performed two tracks, "Ex-Factor" and "Everything Is Everything." She also received a 20-minute tribute from artists including SZA, Doechii, Lizzo, Queen Latifah and Common. Other winners included Cardi B, Kendrick Lamar, Michael B. * "It Depends (The Remix)": Chris Brown feat.
recentArticles.summary: BET Awards nominations 2026: See the full list, led by Cardi B, Kendrick Lamar and Mariah the Scientist - Yahoo

recentArticles.title: 'Köln 75' review: The story behind jazz's most famous concert - The Jerusalem Post
recentArticles.snippet: For jazz aficionados, the title of the movie, *Köln 75*, says it all. They will know that it refers to a concert by Keith Jarrett, an improvisation that was recorded and became the bestselling solo jazz record of all time. Jazz buffs will certainly want to see this movie, which opens in theaters across Israel on Thursday, but it isn’t only for those who are into improvisational jazz. It’s about a love for music more than it is about music itself, and it’s a tale of a magnificent obsession. The movie opens at Vera’s 50th birthday party, where she is surrounded by affectionate friends, but the event is marred by the presence of her judgmental, cold father, who never saw anything of value in her life’s work of promoting and arranging jazz concerts. Vera falls in love with the music, not the man, and she has one goal from then on: To book a major concert for Jarrett in Köln.
recentArticles.summary: 'Köln 75' review: The story behind jazz's most famous concert - The Jerusalem Post

recentArticles.title: Jalen Brunson, NBA champion Knicks score invites to Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce MSG wedding - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Jalen Brunson, NBA champion Knicks score invites to Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce MSG wedding. The Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce Garden party might include, well, some of the championship tenants of MSG. Jalen Brunson and “the starting lineup for the Knicks” have been invited to the power couple’s wedding on Friday in New York, Page Six reported. Swift and the Knicks are plenty familiar with each other, as the “Welcome to New York” singer took in the Knicks’ historic 29-point comeback in Game 4 of the NBA Finals. Swift, who wore a blue and orange “Stevie Knicks” T-shirt, was sitting courtside on Celebrity Row with fellow singers Este Haim and Alana Haim and “Law and Order: Special Victims Unit” actress Mariska Hargitay as the Knicks improbably rallied to win their third game of the Finals. The Haim sisters, along with Hargitay, are among the other high-profile guests invited to the big bash, according to Page Six. Some of Kelce’s Chiefs teammates are expected to attend.
recentArticles.summary: Jalen Brunson, NBA champion Knicks score invites to Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce MSG wedding - New York Post

recentArticles.title: Michael overtakes Oppenheimer as highest-grossing biopic worldwide - BBC
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson movie becomes highest-grossing biopic of all time. **The recently released Michael Jackson movie has overtaken Oppenheimer as the highest-grossing biopic of all time, after taking $977m (£739m) at the worldwide box office.**. But it has now also surpassed director Christopher Nolan's 2023 film about the American theoretical physicist J Robert Oppenheimer, which previously held the box office record for any film based on a real-life figure. Directed by Antoine Fuqua, Michael tells the story of the late US singer's journey from being a child star in family group the Jackson 5, to becoming the solo King of Pop. Jaafar Jackson, the singer's real-life nephew, plays the titular role, with Colman Domingo and Nia Long portraying his parents. Michael has clearly been a huge hit with the performer's many fans around the world, for its study of his childhood and recreations of famous concert performances and music videos.
recentArticles.summary: 麥可傑克森傳記電影《Michael》超越《奧本海默》，成為全球票房最高的傳記電影。

recentArticles.title: Chris Brown Ordered to Pay $13M Over Alleged Dog Attack - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: ### Travis Kelce Spotted On A Run Ahead of Wedding to Taylor Swift. # Chris Brown Ordered to Pay $13M Over Dog Attack. ## Chris Brown Ex-Housekeeper Awarded $13 Million Over Vicious Dog Attack. **Chris Brown** is on the hook for a massive judgement to his ex-housekeeper after a jury found him liable for her injuries from a dog attack on his property, TMZ has learned. A jury came down with the decision on Tuesday after a lengthy trial between Chris and **Maria Avila**. Maria **sued** Chris claiming he was negligent in allowing the large dog to roam his backyard … which is where she claims she was mauled while taking out the trash. In his initial response to the lawsuit, Chris argued Maria provoked the dog and caused her own injuries. In court, Maria said she was covered in blood after the attack. A member of his team eventually made the call. Maria was seeking $90 million in damages from the singer.

recentArticles.title: Inside the wild, black-tie ‘Jackass’ premiere with lewd pasta, outrageous drone show and ‘butt-shaped’ ice luge - Page Six
recentArticles.snippet: # Inside the wild, black-tie ‘Jackass’ premiere with lewd pasta, outrageous drone show and ‘butt-shaped’ ice luge. The “Jackass” crew bid farewell to their chaotic franchise at the premiere of their final film on Wednesday night. The Paramount Theater on the studio’s Hollywood lot was decked out for the black-tie optional “Jackass: Best and Last” premiere, with candelabras, elegant floral arrangements and even a grand piano — where a tatted guy in tighty whities and angel wings played classical interpretations of hits by **Zara Larsson**, **Rihanna** and more. “Jackass: Best and Last” is a love letter to stupidity, and played exceptionally well to the packed crowd with lots of groaning, gagging, eye-covering, wincing, and of course, laughing, in the auditorium. The cast — including Knoxville, **Steve-O**, **Ehren “Danger” McGhehey** (plus his tuxedo-clad dog, **Bugsy**), and **Jason “Wee Man” Acuña** — gathered at the heart of the party to watch a show-stopping drone show. The premiere party featured a wild drone show.
recentArticles.summary: Inside the wild, black-tie ‘Jackass’ premiere with lewd pasta, outrageous drone show and ‘butt-shaped’ ice luge - Page Six

recentArticles.title: Children’s Hospital of Philadelphia Appoints New Division Chief of Hematology - BioSpace
recentArticles.snippet: # Children’s Hospital of Philadelphia Appoints New Division Chief of Hematology. PHILADELPHIA, July 1, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP) is proud to announce the selection of Stella T. Chou, MD, as its new Chief of the Division of Hematology. Dr. Chou served as interim chief since August 2025 and will officially assume the role July 1, leading one of the nation's largest and highly ranked pediatric hematology programs. As a physician scientist, Dr. Chou has dedicated her career to advancing innovative research in sickle cell disease, transfusion medicine and blood cell development. "I am honored to lead our outstanding Division of Hematology," said Dr. Chou, who also serves as Professor of Pediatrics at the Perelman School of Medicine at the University of Pennsylvania and Chief of the Division of Transfusion Medicine at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia. Orange, MD, PhD, Pediatrician-in-Chief and Chair of the Department of Pediatrics at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia. **About Children's Hospital of Philadelphia:**.
recentArticles.summary: Children’s Hospital of Philadelphia Appoints New Division Chief of Hematology - BioSpace

recentArticles.title: Michael Japan Box Office: King Of Pop's Biopic Becomes 2026's 3rd Highest-Grossing Hollywood Release - Koimoi
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Japan Box Office: King Of Pop’s Biopic Becomes 2026’s 3rd Highest-Grossing Hollywood Release. Michael might have slowed down at the North American box office, but it is still hot in Japan. The movie is on track to earn strong numbers at the Japan box office in its third weekend. The King of Pop’s biopic has become one of the biggest Hollywood releases of the year at the box office in Japan. This strong hold at the box office in Japan and Russia could propel it past the **$1 billion** milestone worldwide. The music biopic’s strong run in Russia and Japan is also adding to its worldwide gross. #### **Michael emerges as the 3rd highest-grossing Hollywood release of the year at the box office in Japan**. The music biopic dropped by **27.5%** from last Saturday, and with that, the movie’s box office collection in Japan has hit **$23.1 million**.

recentArticles.title: Adult DVD announce debut self titled album - Northern Transmissions
recentArticles.snippet: Adult DVD will release their self-titled debut album on September 25th on Fat Possum Records. Along with the news, the UK band are sharing new single “Cowboy On Aisle Three.” Adult DVD have had a busy year, appearing at Brighton’s The Great Escape and SXSW in Austin. A relentless touring schedule in 2025 saw them hone their status as festival headliners in waiting, picking up a global army of new fans and playing to huge crowds at Glastonbury, Green Man, End Of The Road and more. On the new album,Hanson and Lonsdale continue to take a screenwriter’s approach to songwriting, filling their lyrics with stories pulled from the outskirts of society yet painting a vivid and comic picture of modern Britain. Produced by the band at The Nave Studios Leeds, the general theme of the album is to let go and take life a little less seriously. Speaking on the new single, the band’s frontman Harry Hanson says: “I came up with the idea when I was in Lidl.

Jay-Z is seen before the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E match between Cote D'Ivoire and Ecuador at Philadelphia Stadium on June 14, 2026, in Philadelphia. With *4:44* celebrating its ninth anniversary on Tuesday (June 30), Jay-Z surprised fans by making three bonus tracks from the album available on all streaming platforms. The trio of songs — which feature collaborations with James Blake and Hov’s daughter Blue Ivy — were previously available on Tidal. Blue Ivy assists on “Blue’s Freestyle / We Family” and Blake returns for “ManyFacedGod,” which finds Jay addressing his union with Beyoncé, a prominent theme across *4:44*. Jay-Z released *4:44* on vinyl for the first time packaged as part of the JAŸ-Z: 30th Anniversary Collector’s Crate, which contains Hov’s 13 solo studio LPs and is available for $1,500 on Roc Nation’s website.

recentArticles.title: Jelly Roll Posts Jaw-Dropping Video of His 200-lb. Weight Loss - The Daily Beast
recentArticles.snippet: The Grammy-winning musician used the video to reflect on his shocking physical transformation. Jelly, whose real name is Jason DeFord, started the video with an old clip of himself from before his weight loss, walking with his head down in the pouring rain, looking exhausted. The video then cut to clips of his December 10 appearance on *The Joe Rogan Experience* podcast. “Every time I said I was going to lose the weight, Joe, I lied to myself,” he tells Rogan in the clip. “I would tell myself I’m going to do this. I’m going to go do that. And I wake up, and I’m like, ‘s--t.’”. I told y’all I was going to go do this walk, and I’m going to do this walk,’” he said. The video then showed more clips of Jelly’s first days walking in the rain before cutting to a present-day video of him running in the rain.

recentArticles.title: Bow Wow: Tiny Desk Concert - NPR
recentArticles.snippet: **Bow Wow: Tiny Desk Concert**  **Bow Wow's transformation from child star to well-rounded entertainer serves as a blueprint for longevity. ## **Tiny Desk**. # Bow Wow: Tiny Desk Concert. *This Black Music Month, Tiny Desk celebrates the undeniable legacy of BET. His transformation from child star to well-rounded entertainer serves as a blueprint for longevity, and honoring the impact and legacy of BET without him would have been incomplete. It's a loyalty that Bow Wow earned, and he basks in that glory as he blazes through his Tiny Desk concert full of back-to-back hits. The decades of dedication to his craft were evident in the cadence, stage presence and high-energy infused in performances of "Shortie Like Mine," "Fresh Azimiz" and "Let Me Hold You." Bow Wow also makes sure to include "Bounce with Me (from the motion picture *Big Momma's House*)," the song that started it all.

recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ Surpasses Oscar-Winner to Become Highest Grossing Biopic - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: Michael Jackson was not only the King of Pop, he's also proving to be the King of the box-office. Almost two decades after his death, Jackson's biopic, "Michael" is creating history at the box-office while being set to touch the coveted $1 billion mark. As per the latest reports, "Michael" has also created history by becoming the highest grossing biopic of all time, dethroning Christopher Nolan's Oscar-winning 2023 mega-project "Oppenheimer.". The King of Pop's real-life nephew, Jaafar Jackson, portrays the role of Michael Jackson for the biopic. Despite the envious box-office numbers, the film opened to a moderate critics rating, as the Tomatometer rates the film at 38%. Despite the difference in the certifications of the two movies with "Michael" getting a PG-13, and Cillian Murphy-starrer "Oppenheimer" an R, the relevance of the "Thriller" hitmaker's biopic cannot be ignored. However, notwithstanding the criticism, the film is still doing well at the box-office, and on its way to grossing $1 billion.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導了麥可傑克森的傳記電影《Michael》在票房上表現強勁，超越《奧本海默》成為史上最高票房傳記片，但內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Jasmine Yen declares bold new era of self-confidence with latest single ‘Roll With Me’ - The Standard (HK)
recentArticles.snippet: # Jasmine Yen declares bold new era of self-confidence with latest single ‘Roll With Me’. Rising singer-songwriter Jasmine Yen has marked her return to the music scene with the release of her latest single, “Roll With Me,” a bold and empowering anthem that signals a fresh, independent chapter in her burgeoning career. Yen uses a playful vocal delivery and distinct charisma to champion individuality and unfiltered self-expression, dedicating the project to a new era defined by complete creative freedom. Following the release, she took to social media to express gratitude to her creative team and her family, whom she credited as her ultimate source of support. A natural talent who began songwriting at just seven years old, the introverted artist turned to music as her primary emotional outlet, a passion that eventually earned her a scholarship to the prestigious Berklee College of Music. “Roll With Me” serves as the opening chapter of her new artistic journey, leaving fans highly expectant for her upcoming body of work.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導主要關於歌手嚴正嵐（Jasmine Yen）發行新單曲《Roll With Me》，內容未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: A new banger to add to your K-pop playlist. 🎧 Link to full story in the comment section. - facebook.com
recentArticles.snippet: ## ABS-CBN News's Post. ### **ABS-CBN News**. A new banger to add to your K-pop playlist. Link to full story in the comment section. Read: https://www.abs-cbn.com/.../hearts2hearts-celebrates... Hearts2Hearts celebrates togetherness with summer EP 'Lemon Tang' | ABS-CBN Entertainment. It was such a fun song and the MV is so bright like summer. The B-sides are also nice, especially Baby steps and Hearth Emoji. Definitely another banger from this group that never misses. lowkey plugging h2h sa pilipinas kase konti lang filo hachu. lss ako sa chorus ng Lemon Tang. Wala sa mga Bagong Generation ng mga kpop groups na makakalampas sa 3rd and 4th Gen. If kpop Agencies wants to Surpass those Gen they need To Hire talent na gaya ang meron sa BINI at Kitty Duterte. Most relevant is selected, so some comments may have been filtered out.
